creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
I upgraded from 7.2 to 8.0 RC1 over the weekend.  I attempted 
	to upgrade ports using portupgrade -af --batch with no success.
	Every time I do this, the upgrade of hal fails horribly with 
	an undefined symbol USB_GET_REPORT_ID.  I looked through the 
	older reports and saw this error from last January, which 
	appeared to have been fixed.  I verified the removal of port 
	libusb, and I rebuilt the kernel and world to make sure I 
	didn't miss anything to no avail.

	What exactly did I miss?

How-To-Repeat: 	portupgrade hal
